items.caption: A collection of six custom t-shirt designs with various color combinations. each t-shirt features the text "kirkwood trading company" in different styles and colors, suggesting a range of customization options. the t-shirts are arranged in two rows of three, with the top row showing a blue, orange, and gray design, and the bottom row showing a yellow, purple, and red design. the background is a neutral gray, and there is a watermark text overlay that reads "kirkwood trading company - custom t-shirt screen printing," indicating the service offered by the company. the overall style of the image is promotional, showcasing the variety of color combinations available for custom t-shirt printing.
